app.name: SlugBase
app.tagline: Your links. Your structure. Your language. Your rules.

setup.title: Initial Setup
setup.description: Welcome to SlugBase! Create your first admin user to get started.
setup.name: Name
setup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
setup.adminNote: This user will be created as an administrator. You can configure OIDC providers later in the admin settings.

bookmarks.name: Title
bookmarks.slugOptionalHint: Leave empty if you don't need a custom slug
bookmarks.noFoldersAvailable: No folders available. Create folders to organize your bookmarks.

bookmarks.shareWithTeamsDescription: Select teams to share this bookmark with. All members of selected teams will be able to view this bookmark.
bookmarks.shareAllTeamsDescription: Share with all teams you are a member of

bookmarks.slugRequired: Slug is required when forwarding is enabled
bookmarks.slugAlreadyExists: Slug already exists. Slugs must be unique across all bookmarks.
bookmarks.searchEngineNote: Want to quickly access your bookmarks from your browser's address bar?

bookmarks.forwardingPreviewDescription: This is the URL that will forward to your bookmark
bookmarks.importDescription: Import bookmarks from a JSON or HTML file. JSON files should contain an array of bookmark objects with title and url fields.
bookmarks.supportedFormats: Supported formats: JSON, HTML (Netscape bookmark format)

apiDocs.title: API Documentation
apiDocs.description: Complete API reference for SlugBase. All endpoints require authentication via JWT tokens except where noted.

admin.title: Admin
admin.description: Manage users, groups, OIDC providers, and system settings
admin.clientIdRequired: Client ID is required when creating a new provider
admin.customEndpointsDescription: Override default OIDC endpoint paths. Leave empty to use standard paths based on issuer URL.
admin.leaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep current value
admin.confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
admin.confirmDeleteTeam: Are you sure you want to delete this team?
admin.confirmDeleteGroup: Are you sure you want to delete this team?
admin.confirmDeleteProvider: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
admin.confirmDeleteSetting: Are you sure you want to delete this setting?
admin.noTeams: No teams assigned to this user
admin.searchTeams: Search teams by name or description...
admin.searchUsers: Search users by name or email...
admin.apiDocsNote: API documentation is available as a standalone page

passwordReset.title: Reset Password
passwordReset.description: Enter your email address to receive a password reset link
passwordReset.requestSent: If an account with this email exists, a password reset link has been sent.
passwordReset.resetSuccess: Password reset successfully! You can now log in with your new password.

emailVerification.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address...
emailVerification.successDescription: Your email address has been successfully changed to {{email}}.
emailVerification.errorDescription: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
emailVerification.emailSent: Verification email sent! Please check your new email address.
emailVerification.pendingDescription: A verification email has been sent to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the verification link to complete the change.

smtp.title: SMTP Email Configuration
smtp.description: Configure SMTP settings for sending emails (e.g., password reset emails)
smtp.passwordPlaceholder: Enter password to set or change
smtp.passwordChangeHint: Enter a new password to change it, or leave empty to keep current password
smtp.demoModeDisabled: SMTP configuration is disabled in demo mode. The database is reset periodically, and email settings would be lost.

shared.title: Shared
shared.description: Bookmarks and folders shared with you

searchEngineGuide.title: Custom Search Engine Setup Guide
searchEngineGuide.description: Learn how to set up a custom search engine in your browser to quickly access your bookmarks
searchEngineGuide.howItWorksDescription: By setting up a custom search engine, you can type a keyword (like 'go') followed by a bookmark slug in your browser's address bar to instantly navigate to that bookmark.
searchEngineGuide.urlNote: Use this URL template when setting up your custom search engine. The %s will be replaced with your bookmark slug.
searchEngineGuide.chromiumDescription: Follow these steps to add SlugBase as a custom search engine:
searchEngineGuide.chromiumStep4a: Name: SlugBase (or any name you prefer)
searchEngineGuide.chromiumStep4b: Keyword: go (or any keyword you prefer)
searchEngineGuide.chromiumStep4c: URL: Use the search URL shown above
searchEngineGuide.chromiumStep5: Click 'Add' or 'Save' to complete the setup
searchEngineGuide.firefoxDescription: Follow these steps to add SlugBase as a custom search engine:
searchEngineGuide.firefoxStep2: Navigate to 'Search' in the settings menu
searchEngineGuide.firefoxStep3: Scroll down and click 'Add' under 'One-Click Search Engines'
searchEngineGuide.firefoxStep4a: Name: SlugBase (or any name you prefer)
searchEngineGuide.firefoxStep4b: Keyword: go (or any keyword you prefer)
searchEngineGuide.firefoxStep4c: URL: Use the search URL shown above
searchEngineGuide.usageStep1: After setup, simply type in your browser's address bar:
searchEngineGuide.usageStep2: Press Enter, and you'll be redirected to the bookmark with the slug 'test'
searchEngineGuide.usageNote: Replace 'test' with any bookmark slug you've created in SlugBase!

landing.heroTitle: Your links. Your structure. Your rules.
landing.heroSubtitle: A modern bookmark manager with optional short links. Organize, share, and access your bookmarks anywhere.
landing.feature1Desc: Folders and tags. Pin important links. Search across everything.
landing.feature2Desc: Optional forwarding URLs: your-key/slug for quick sharing.
landing.feature3Desc: Share bookmarks and folders with teams or individual users.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple plans for individuals and teams.
pricing.earlySupporterNote: No Team, no SLA. Billing integration coming soon.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with us.
contact.name: Name

contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
